page_metadata.biotools__summary: The bardensr (barcode dexmixing through non-negative spatial regression) package is a collection of tools for modeling linearly multiplexed observations. There is some true signal we are interested in, but our observations are some noisy linear mixture of those signals.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The bardensr (barcode dexmixing through non-negative spatial regression) package is a collection of tools for modeling linearly multiplexed observations.
